name: ledger-api
description: Double-entry bookkeeping API for accounts, transactions, and entries — TypeScript on AWS Lambda, Aurora Serverless v2 (Postgres) via the RDS Data API, IAM-authenticated API Gateway.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build:local-handler: esbuild local/handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/local-handler.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.start:local: npm run build && npm run build:local-handler && sam local start-api --docker-network ledger-api_default
